jobs.title: Zoho CRM Specialist for Multi-business Setup
jobs.description:
Project Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Zoho CRM specialist to design and implement an initial CRM setup for a group of three related businesses operating under a shared structure.

The businesses operate independently but share resources and require both separate and consolidated reporting.

This is a Phase 1 engagement focused on building a clean, scalable CRM foundation.

Business Structure:

The CRM will support three entities:

Residential construction business
Joinery business
Stone and surfaces business

jobs.title: Commercial-grade EV Motor Controller Design -- 2
jobs.description:
I am looking for an experienced power electronics engineer to design a commercial-grade EV motor controller for e-scooter, e-rickshaw, and e-loader applications.

##  System Requirements:

### Input:

* 40V – 90V DC (supports 48V, 60V, 72V battery systems)
* Automotive voltage variation and transients must be handled

### Output:

* 3-phase BLDC motor control
* 60A continuous current, 80A peak

### Control Type:

* Preferred: Sine wave or FOC (Field Oriented Control)
* Smooth acceleration and low noise required

---

##  Functional Features:

* Throttle input (0–5V analog)
* Brake input (cutof

I am looking for a writer who can craft polished, persuasive website copy that projects a formal, trustworthy voice across every page. The goal is to position the brand as authoritative while guiding visitors smoothly toward enquiry and purchase actions.  

Alongside the core site text, I also need companion content tailored for Instagram and Twitter so messaging stays consistent when we amplify pages on social. Expect concise, platform-specific captions that echo the same formal tone, incorporate relevant hashtags where appropriate, and encourage click-throughs back to the site.

jobs.title: Cinematic Wedding Video Editor
jobs.description:
I have a full set of raw wedding clips and need them transformed into a polished, cinematic film running between 5 and 10 minutes. The final cut must weave in the spoken vows as an overlay and highlight the intimate preparations and “getting ready” moments so the story unfolds with real emotion from start to finish.

You’ll receive multi-camera footage, separate audio tracks, and a brief rundown of the day’s timeline. I’m counting on you to choose the strongest shots, apply tasteful color grading, mix the audio cleanly, and pace the edit so it feels like a short movie rather than a recap. If y
